# CANDIDATE: VERIFY_5_01_ENTRY

**Filed:** 2026-06-18
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** quality_gate
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We aim to verify that the existing engine logic (or a proposed quality gate) captures the 5/01 11:50 entry for +$470 and avoids introducing new losses on J loser days (5/05, 5/06, 5/07) by ensuring the engine only takes trades that meet specific quality criteria present on 5/01 and absent on loser days.

## Mechanism

The mechanism is to be determined via Stage-1 backtest. We will test various quality gates (e.g., based on VIX, ribbon conditions, confluence, time-of-day) to see which ones yield the desired behavior on the J anchor days. The gate will be designed to allow entry on 5/01 at 11:50 and block or reduce losses on 5/05, 5/06, 5/07.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline (per OP-20 disclosure 1 and LESSONS-LEARNED L11).
2. **Sample bias:** We are testing on 4 winner days and 3 loser days from J's source-of-truth (7 days total). This is a very small sample and highly susceptible to overfit. We must validate on out-of-sample data.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (walk-forward held-out window not yet performed).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (real OPRA validation on top 3 J days not yet done).
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: if the gate is too restrictive, we may miss the 5/01 winner; if too loose, we may incur losses on loser days. Max drawdown scenario: the gate could cause us to miss multiple winners or take multiple losers. Blow-up scenario: the gate could cause us to take large losses on non-J days due to overfit.
6. **Concentration:** We cannot estimate concentration without knowing the gate's behavior across the full dataset. If the gate is triggered only on a few days, concentration could be high.

## Pre-merge gate

Stage-1 backtest on J anchor days showing 5/01 yields +$470 and no new losers on 5/05, 5/06, 5/07; walk-forward OOS test with positive edge_capture; real-fills validation on top 3 J days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04) showing similar P&L to BS sim within ±20%.

## Confidence

2 / 10 -- We have not yet defined the mechanism or run any backtest. This is a proposal to run the verification.

unknown -- requires comparison with existing candidates in _LEADERBOARD.md. May complement or conflict depending on the mechanism.
